response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:38: Promotional segment, no vocal music. 2. 04:38-05:04: Vocal performance of 'Gira Gira'. 3. On-screen text identified 'Lyrics, Music: てには', which corresponds to the Vocaloid producer 'てにをは' (Tenioha). 4. Searched for 'ギラギラ てにをは lyrics' and 'ギラギラ てにをは english translation'. 5. Retrieved full Japanese and English lyrics for the song. 6. JSON constructed.
response.global_summary: A promotional video showcasing merchandise for Ouro Kronii's birthday, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Gira Gira'.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii presents various birthday merchandise, including a happi, a button badge, an oshi bag, a plushie keychain, and various set purchase bonuses.
Ouro Kronii performs a segment of the song 'Gira Gira'. The text on screen credits the song to Tenioha.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, truly, what a wonderful world
And so, once again today, my own unsightliness confuses me
And yet, this feeling of wanting to be loved by another
Is what makes me suffer, right?

Ugly, honestly, my face is as if
God drew it with his left hand
Inevitably, all the love songs this world has to offer
Certainly not a single one is written for me

Kisses I can’t use, pity cast upon me
Protecting my body is a scar of spangles
Enough to make me unlovable

Dazzlingly I shine and swallow the dark of the night
Rap tap tap tap
Now, watch this love
1 mg of fireworks sting my eyes
Drag on, drag on
How funny, this world is bizarre

Unknown, even to the Buddha in his enlightenment I remain unknown
It seems like I’ve surely gone insane
Is it the world at fault or is it me?
Co-existing was impossible from the start

Fake things are all the more endearing, I just ran with all I had
Before the heavy acid rain washes it away
I hold my fluorescent scar dearly

Burning, I spit fire, I am the wolf of the night
Rap tap tap tap
Watch this dance from there
Become strong with your own makeup
Flap up, flap up
Suddenly, anxiously

Loneliness is gasoline, walking through a servile town
Close your eyes, are you ready yet, are you ready yet?
If only God were left-handed, I wonder how happy I would be

Dazzlingly I shine and swallow the dark of the night
Rap tap tap tap
Now, watch this love
1 mg of fireworks sting my eyes
Drag on, drag on
How funny, this world is bizarre

Give love, flowers are blooming (Gira Gira)
No one, not even anyone, can remain as they are
What a wonderful world this is!
Let's shine on
",reference_lyrics_og:
